title: Reference protocol for Infliximab PK/PD monitoring
scope: Biologic therapeutic drug monitoring for suspected loss of response.

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.text: Support consistent review of infliximab therapeutic drug monitoring cases across the hospital network.

sections.heading: Escalation criteria
sections.text: Escalate when subtherapeutic trough level is combined with suspected loss of response, positive anti-drug antibodies, high inflammatory markers, or missing critical context.

sections.heading: Required data
sections.text: Include last dose date, trough timing, measured level, anti-drug antibodies, CRP, albumin, clinical activity score, and treatment history.

sections.heading: AI use guardrail
sections.text: AI may summarize, retrieve protocol sections, identify missing data, and draft documentation. Final clinical decision requires expert validation.

title: Reference protocol for Adalimumab PK/PD monitoring

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.text: Standardize review of adalimumab monitoring across satellite hospitals.

sections.heading: Escalation criteria
sections.text: Escalate when trough level is below target, anti-drug antibodies are present, adherence uncertainty exists, or clinical activity is worsening.

sections.heading: Required data
sections.text: Include dosing interval, last administration, level timing, antibodies, CRP, clinical score, and adherence notes.

sections.heading: AI use guardrail
sections.text: AI output is a draft and must not be treated as a prescription or diagnosis.

title: Reference protocol for Ustekinumab PK/PD monitoring
scope: Biologic monitoring for selected complex cases.

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.text: Provide a consistent workflow for ustekinumab PK/PD review.

sections.heading: Escalation criteria
sections.text: Escalate if drug level is low with persistent activity, complex comedication, or unresolved interpretation.

sections.heading: Required data
sections.text: Include weight, last dose date, measured level, CRP, albumin, disease activity and previous biologic exposure.

sections.heading: AI use guardrail
sections.text: AI may compare cases and protocols but does not autonomously recommend therapy.

title: Reference protocol for Vancomycin PK/PD monitoring
scope: Antibiotic therapeutic drug monitoring for severe infection contexts.

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.text: Help hospitals identify high-risk vancomycin monitoring cases requiring expert review.

sections.heading: Escalation criteria
sections.text: Escalate when levels are outside target, kidney function worsens, timing of sampling is uncertain, or patient is critically ill.

sections.heading: Required data
sections.text: Include dose schedule, administration times, sample time, drug level, creatinine trend, weight, renal replacement therapy status, and infection context.

sections.heading: AI use guardrail
sections.text: AI may prepare a case packet and retrieve protocol excerpts. Dosing decisions remain under clinician responsibility.

title: Reference protocol for Tacrolimus PK/PD monitoring
scope: Immunosuppressant monitoring for complex variability cases.

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.text: Coordinate interpretation of tacrolimus levels in patients with variability or toxicity risk.

sections.heading: Escalation criteria
sections.text: Escalate if trough levels are repeatedly outside range, interacting medicines are present, or renal toxicity risk increases.

sections.heading: Required data
sections.text: Include trough timing, dose, interacting drugs, creatinine, transplantation or immunosuppression context, and toxicity symptoms.

sections.heading: AI use guardrail
sections.text: AI may extract comedications and summarize history but cannot approve final dose changes.

title: Reference protocol for Voriconazole PK/PD monitoring

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.text: Support antifungal monitoring, especially in complex oncology or immunosuppressed patients.

sections.heading: Escalation criteria
sections.text: Escalate when levels are below target, above safety range, liver enzymes rise, or relevant CYP interactions are identified.

sections.heading: Required data
sections.text: Include dose, timing, level, ALT, AST, bilirubin, comedications, infection indication and absorption concerns.

sections.heading: AI use guardrail
sections.text: AI may detect missing information and draft review notes. Expert review is required for clinical action.
